locations.name: Jerry Falwell Library
locations.description: The main university library, offering quiet study floors, group study rooms, research help desks, and a large collection of print and digital resources.
locations.opening_hours: Mon-Thu 7:00 AM - 2:00 AM, Fri 7:00 AM - 9:00 PM, Sat 9:00 AM - 9:00 PM, Sun 1:00 PM - 2:00 AM

events.name: Late Night Study Session
events.details: Extended quiet hours with free coffee on Lower Level 1.

locations.name: LaHaye Recreation Center
locations.description: Liberty's main fitness facility featuring a gym, weight room, indoor track access, basketball courts, and group fitness classes.
locations.opening_hours: Mon-Fri 5:00 AM - 11:00 PM, Sat 8:00 AM - 9:00 PM, Sun 1:00 PM - 9:00 PM
locations.map_reference: East Campus, adjacent to Indoor Track

events.name: Group Fitness: HIIT Class
events.details: High intensity interval training, Studio A.

locations.name: Montview Student Union
locations.description: The hub of student life, housing dining options, a bookstore, event spaces, lounges, and administrative offices.

events.name: Live Music Night
events.details: Open mic and live performances, Montview Plaza.

locations.name: Williams Stadium
locations.description: Liberty's football stadium, home to the Flames football team, with seating for over 25,000 fans.
locations.opening_hours: Open on game days; gates open 2 hours before kickoff

events.name: Flames Football Home Game
events.details: Liberty Flames vs visiting team, gates open at 5:00 PM.

locations.name: Baseball Stadium (Liberty Baseball Stadium)
locations.description: Home field for Liberty's baseball team, featuring stadium seating, concessions, and a team store.
locations.opening_hours: Open on game days; gates open 1 hour before first pitch

events.name: Liberty Baseball Home Game
events.details: Conference game, first pitch at 6:30 PM.

locations.name: School of Business
locations.description: Houses business administration classrooms, faculty offices, case-study rooms, and the business honors program suite.
locations.opening_hours: Mon-Fri 7:00 AM - 9:00 PM, Sat 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM, Closed Sunday
locations.map_reference: Central Campus, near Arthur S. DeMoss Hall

events.name: Business Networking Mixer
events.details: Meet alumni and local employers, Atrium.

locations.name: Residential Commons
locations.description: On-campus student housing complex with dining hall access, lounges, study rooms, and laundry facilities.
locations.opening_hours: 24/7 for residents; front desk staffed 7:00 AM - 12:00 AM

events.name: Floor Game Night
events.details: Board games and snacks in the common lounge.

locations.name: The Hill
locations.description: Liberty's main dining hall offering a variety of food stations including grill, pizza, salad bar, and international cuisine.
locations.opening_hours: Mon-Fri 7:00 AM - 8:00 PM, Sat-Sun 8:00 AM - 7:00 PM

locations.name: Campus East
locations.description: Residential complex on the east side of campus, featuring apartment-style suites and a community center.
locations.opening_hours: 24/7 for residents; community center 8:00 AM - 10:00 PM
locations.map_reference: East Campus, near Hydaway Outdoor Recreation Center

locations.name: Center for Music and the Worship Arts
locations.description: State-of-the-art facility for music, worship, and performing arts programs, including rehearsal halls, recording studios, and a concert hall.
locations.opening_hours: Mon-Fri 7:00 AM - 10:00 PM, Sat 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Closed Sunday
locations.map_reference: Central Campus, near Liberty Worship Center

events.name: Student Recital
events.details: Vocal and instrumental student performances, Concert Hall.

locations.name: Center for Natural Sciences
locations.description: Houses classrooms, faculty offices, and research facilities for biology, chemistry, environmental science, and related programs.
locations.opening_hours: Mon-Fri 7:00 AM - 9:00 PM, Sat 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM, Closed Sunday

locations.name: Center for Natural Sciences Lab
locations.description: Dedicated laboratory wing of the Center for Natural Sciences, equipped for chemistry, biology, and physics lab sessions.
locations.opening_hours: Mon-Fri 8:00 AM - 8:00 PM, Closed Saturday and Sunday
locations.map_reference: Central Campus, attached to Center for Natural Sciences

locations.name: Gun Club
locations.description: Liberty University's shooting sports facility, offering ranges and equipment for club members and approved courses.
locations.opening_hours: Tue, Thu 2:00 PM - 6:00 PM, Sat 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM
locations.map_reference: Off East Campus, near outdoor recreation areas

locations.name: Hydaway Outdoor Recreation Center
locations.description: Outdoor recreation hub featuring a lake with swimming beach, kayaks, paddleboards, hammocks, and outdoor event space.
locations.opening_hours: Mon-Sat 11:00 AM - 7:00 PM, Closed Sunday (seasonal hours apply)

events.name: Sunset Kayak Hour
events.details: Free kayak rentals until sunset, weather permitting.

locations.name: Indoor Track
locations.description: Climate-controlled indoor track facility used for training, practice, and intramural events, located beside LaHaye Recreation Center.
locations.opening_hours: Mon-Fri 6:00 AM - 10:00 PM, Sat 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Sun 2:00 PM - 8:00 PM
locations.map_reference: East Campus, adjacent to LaHaye Recreation Center

events.name: Track Team Practice
events.details: Closed to public during scheduled team practice 6-8 PM.
